title: Rages
summary: When you go berserk, everyone fears you.
tiers: Tier 3: Power Strike or Unarmored Fighter
Tier 6: Greater Enhanced Potential or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: It’s easy for a berserker to lose control and attack friend as well as foe.
text: When you go berserk, everyone fears you.
details: When you go berserk, everyone fears you.
